source_of_truth: Git history in sgwoods/sci-fi-ai-dystopian-project, with sgwoods/public as the companion public-output repo.
working_clone_model: Use a normal non-iCloud active clone for day-to-day work. Use iCloud for intake and backup-oriented convenience paths.

current_track.label: Current Track
current_track.note: The curation corpus is stable enough to recover from GitHub, and the current migration priority is making the operating model portable and low-confusion across machines.

current_focus.label: Current Focus
current_focus.note: The repo should remain easy to bootstrap on a new Mac while ongoing quote review and source expansion continue.

build_line.label: Build Line
build_line.note: The canonical review board currently contains 44 records and drives the generated approved, candidate, postponed, declined, and public-page artifacts.

updated.label: Updated
updated.note: Status, handoff docs, and bootstrap scripts are intended to stay synchronized.
